title: Whisperkit
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Whisperkits''' were small furry four-limbed creatures whose ears quivered when frightened. They were domesticated and kept as pets.

[[Eriaduan rat]]s were considered slightly larger than whisperkits.<ref name="GORW">''[[Geonosis and the Outer Rim Worlds]]''</ref>

==Appearances==
*''[[Coruscant Nights III: Patterns of Force]]'' {{Mo}}
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Balance Point]]'' {{1st}}

==Sources==
*<!-- 2004-03-24 -->''[[Geonosis and the Outer Rim Worlds]]''
